LIM - analysis of results

Ceres Barros

26/04/2021

DATA LOADING AND PROCESSING NOTES

Given the size of the data put together in a pixel-based format, results were sampled every 10 years (instead of the 5-year interval used for saving),

TESTING DIFFERENCES BETWEEN OBSERVED AND SIMULATED AGES

At the end of the simulation

## [1] "No fire"
## Linear mixed model fit by REML ['lmerMod']
## Formula: abs(ageDiffSimObs) ~ scenario + (scenario | vegTypeCN)
##    Data: DT
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 3397438
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max

SCENARIO EFFECTS ON STAND AGE, ALPHA DIVERSITY AND BETA DIVERSITY

Across the landscape in pixels with/without fire
